applications.name: frontend-design plugin wrapper
applications.description: Accelerate Data wrapper around Anthropic's official frontend-design skill, with Claude and Codex manifests.

claude_manifest.description: Claude plugin manifest for the frontend-design wrapper.

codex_manifest.description: Codex plugin manifest for the frontend-design wrapper.

frontend_design_skill.description: Upstream-owned Anthropic frontend-design skill copied from plugins/frontend-design/skills/frontend-design/.

sync_workflow.description: Weekly and manual sparse upstream sync workflow that opens a pull request.

scripts.description: Repository helper scripts. setup-worktree.sh prepares a newly created sibling worktree.

docs.description: Local design specs and implementation plans for this wrapper repository.

key_directories..github/workflows/: Repository CI and upstream sync workflows

commands.validate_wrapper: jq empty .claude-plugin/plugin.json && jq empty .codex-plugin/plugin.json && test -f skills/frontend-design/SKILL.md && test ! -e skills/example-skill && test ! -e tests/evals && rg -n "anthropics/claude-plugins-official|plugins/frontend-design|schedule" .github/workflows/sync-upstream.yml

conventions.skill_location: The packaged runtime skill lives under skills/frontend-design/.
conventions.upstream_owned_content: skills/frontend-design/ and LICENSE are synced from anthropics/claude-plugins-official/plugins/frontend-design.
conventions.wrapper_owned_content: Plugin manifests, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, README.md, repo-map.json, workflows, scripts, and docs are maintained in this wrapper repository.
conventions.upstream_edit_warning: Warn before editing skills/frontend-design/ because local edits may diverge from future upstream syncs.
conventions.worktrees: Use sibling worktrees at ../worktrees/<branch-name> and run scripts/setup-worktree.sh after creation.
conventions.local_dev_symlinks: For direct local use, symlink skills/frontend-design into ~/.claude/skills/frontend-design and ~/.codex/skills/frontend-design.
conventions.marketplace_scope: Marketplace entries belong in plugin-marketplace and should point to this wrapper repository as a URL source.

notes_for_agents.startup: Read this file before exploring the repository. It is the primary startup context for structure, ownership, and validation commands.
notes_for_agents.marketplace_model: This repository is a plugin source, not a marketplace. Marketplaces in other repositories should point to this repo as the plugin source.
notes_for_agents.eval_scope: This repository intentionally does not own local eval coverage for upstream Anthropic skill behavior.
notes_for_agents.update_repo_map: Refresh this file whenever manifests, skill layout, sync workflow layout, validation commands, or key docs change.
